dialogos.texto_en: I think we can take this route.
Oh, never mind, it's impossible...
Let's give it a try!\nIt'll definitely be fun!
What are you standing here chatting about?
Futaro? Did you perhaps come to see me?
No... It's just a coincidence or whatever...\nI just happened to pass by here.
I see.
Uesugi-saaan, you shouldn't say that.\nEven if it's a coincidence,\nyou got to see Miku. You should be happy about that.
You're here too, aren't you.
Don't worry about me.\nWell then, see you later!
Hey, wait a second.
What is it?
Even if we met by chance,\nwe decided to spend time together.\nWeren't you the ones who decided that?
Well, I suppose...
And besides, Miku,\nyou said you were going to the backstreets, right?
This is one of those backstreets.\nI just happened to meet Yotsuba here.
I see. So, what were you talking about?
We were talking about renting bicycles\nand touring the sightseeing spots.
Ah, I see.\nThat kind of service is common in tourist areas.\nIt sounds interesting.
But I think it's better if I don't do it.
Why?
Because there's no way I can keep up\nwith Yotsuba's speed.
...That's true.\nIt would be a complete disaster for Miku and I.
Whaa, even you, Uesugi-san?\nI'll make sure to match everyone else's pace.
No, your enthusiasm makes you lose sight\nof your surroundings. You might get distracted\nby the scenery and start speeding up.
Your eyes do wander...
Oooohh!\nIt's frustrating that I can't deny it.
However, cycling doesn't sound like a bad idea,\ndoes it?
At a leisurely pace,\nit would feel great to ride along the coast.
But, Itsuki.
Ah! That's right!\nI completely forgot!
What's up with Itsuki?
...Is it okay to say it?
The thing is, Itsuki's the only one\namong us that can't ride a bike.
You just went and said it...
Oh wow, I didn't know that.\nThat's so Itsuki, huh?
Ah! Uesugi-san?\nYou shouldn't make fun of Itsuki\njust because she can't ride a bike, you know?
I know.
...Do you really know, though?
However, I didn't know that until today.
Itsuki's been hiding it from those around her.
Though it's obvious to us. Ahaha...
Hmmm.\nBut I think it would be much more convenient\nif she could ride%p-2;――
Maybe we should stop pretending that\nwe don't know, and start special bicycle \ntraining for her?
Yeah, we can make plans to go cycling together\nand make it a goal for Itsuki to work towards!
That'd be nice, huh?\nGood luck with that.
Uesugi-san?\nWhy are you talking about it\nlike you're not involved?
Huh?
Let's go cycling together, Futaro.
That's fine, but...
Well, we can't go cycling until Itsuki can ride.
Of course, you'll help us, right, Uesugi-san?
Why do you want Itsuki\nto be able to ride so badly?
Well, it's kind of lonely, you know.\nIf only one person can't ride.
It's fine to make a plan as you like,\nbut it'd be best not to force her, right?
If you're going to do it,\nat least confirm with Itsuki first.
Of course.\nI have no intention of forcing anyone.
Well, if you request it,\nshe just might give it her all.
I wonder if there are practice bikes or something.\nI'll look it up later.
Why do you want Itsuki\nto be able to ride so badly?
Well, it's kind of lonely, you know.\nIf only one person can't ride.
Setting goals is a good idea.
Really?\nOh, I never thought I'd be praised by you,\nUesugi-san!
You guys studied hard because you had goals,\ndidn't you?\nIt's the same thing.
Oh, that's true.
I was able to work hard,\neven on subjects I didn't like,\nbecause I had goals.
It's important to be able to see the finish line.\nIt's easy to see how far you've come.
Alright!\nI'll suggest it to Itsuki\nwhen we get back from our trip.
I wonder if there are practice bikes or something.\nI'll look it up later.
Why do you want Itsuki\nto be able to ride so badly?
Well, it's kind of lonely, you know.\nIf only one person can't ride.
I'm sure it'll be fine. Itsuki will have us\nand Uesugi-san to support her.\nThere's nothing she can't do!
After all, thanks to everyone, even silly ol' me\nwas able to get into university.
I also learned how to cook,\nthanks to the help of Yotsuba and Nino.
I'm sure Itsuki will be able to ride a bicycle too.
So, when Itsuki learns to ride a bike,\nlet's all go cycling together!
Okay, so when Itsuki learns to ride a bike,\nlet's all go cycling together!
That's a good idea to go with everyone, but...\nI'd like to go with Futaro. Just the two of us.
If it's just the two of us,\nwe could ride at the same pace, right?
Well... I'd be a little worried\nif it's just you and me.\nMostly about our physical endurance.
Then, shall I train with both of you?!\nTee-hee!
